summary: Iteration 17: Comprehensive testing of new event fields (themes, circuit_type, has_timer, social links) from sportsnconnect.com. Backend: 15/15 tests passed - all new fields are accepted by POST /api/events and returned correctly by GET /api/events/{id}. Frontend: All new form fields verified in organizer dashboard create event form (Step 2: themes multi-select tags, circuit type dropdown, timer Oui/Non buttons; Step 3: 5 social link inputs with icons). Event detail page displays themes badges, circuit type, timer status, and social links section correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17: Verified new event fields from sportsnconnect.com. Key data-testids: Step 2 form: themes-grid, theme-{name}, circuit-type-select, has-timer-yes, has-timer-no. Step 3 form: event-website, event-facebook, event-instagram, event-twitter, event-youtube. Event detail page: event-meta-section (themes + circuit + timer), social-links-section, social-website, social-facebook, social-instagram, social-twitter, social-youtube. Backend EventCreate model has: themes (List[str]), circuit_type (str), has_timer (bool), website_url, facebook_url, instagram_url, twitter_url, youtube_url (all Optional[str]).
features_verified: Backend POST /api/events accepts new fields: themes, circuit_type, has_timer, website_url, facebook_url, instagram_url, twitter_url, youtube_url
Backend GET /api/events/{id} returns all new fields correctly
